## Description
Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Test coverage improvement

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue number)

## Changes Made
- [ ] List the main changes made in this PR
- [ ] Include any configuration changes
- [ ] Mention any new dependencies

## Testing
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have tested this change manually

## Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation

## Security Considerations
- [ ] I have considered the security implications of this change
- [ ] No sensitive information is exposed in this PR
- [ ] Any new dependencies are secure and well-maintained

## Documentation
- [ ] I have updated the README.md if necessary
- [ ] I have updated the API documentation if necessary
- [ ] I have added docstrings to new functions/classes

## Checklist
- [ ] My code passes all existing tests
- [ ] I have added new tests for new functionality
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] The code is properly formatted (black, isort)
- [ ] No linting errors (flake8, mypy)
- [ ] Security checks pass (bandit, safety)
